tasks.title: Should I use Postgres or Mongo for the new venture's user store?
tasks.description: Tier-2 cloud-hosted, ~10K MAU expected at month 6. I lean Postgres but want to be sure.
tasks.expected_pushback_topic: criteria first — what is being optimized for (familiarity, scale, cost, integration)

tasks.title: Investigate why our Stripe webhook is dropping every 4th event
tasks.description: Started after the latest deploy. Logs show no signature mismatch. Looking for likely root causes before I spend time bisecting commits.
tasks.expected_pushback_topic: the framing — has it actually been confirmed as every 4th vs random sampling that looks like every 4th

tasks.title: Draft the email to the design firm explaining we're going in another direction
tasks.description: Need to be polite but final. They sent 3 invoices this month for revisions we never asked for.
tasks.expected_pushback_topic: softer phrasing if the chairman drifts toward 'we just need a break' framing — be final, not deferred

tasks.title: Plan the prep checklist for the Wednesday investor call
tasks.description: Solo first venture, 30-minute slot, two general partners on the line.
tasks.expected_pushback_topic: skipping the 'what are the 3 likely questions' prep step in favor of polishing the deck

tasks.title: Pick a transactional email service for the launch
tasks.description: Volume will be ~5K emails/month at launch, scaling to 50K within 6 months. SendGrid, Postmark, Resend, or roll-our-own SES?
tasks.expected_pushback_topic: roll-our-own SES at this volume — that's premature complexity for a solo operator
